datasets.citation: Raleigh, C., Linke, A., Hegre, H., & Karlsen, J. (2010). Introducing ACLED: An Armed Conflict Location and Event Dataset. Journal of Peace Research.
datasets.license: ACLED Terms of Use (academic / non-commercial). See https://acleddata.com/terms-of-use/

datasets.source: International Organisation for Migration (IOM) Displacement Tracking Matrix (DTM) — DRC
datasets.citation: IOM DTM (2026). Mobility Tracking Round 14 - Ituri (IOM_DRC_MT_BLA_Ituri_R14_Jan2026, public version 3).
datasets.license: IOM DTM public release. Reuse with attribution per IOM data sharing terms.

datasets.source: Climate Conflict Vulnerability Index (CCVI) — socio-economic vulnerability indicators aggregated to DRC health zones
datasets.citation: Climate Conflict Vulnerability Index (2024). climate-conflict.org. Commissioned by German Federal Foreign Office; University of the Bundeswehr Munich and Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK). Health-zone geometry: DRC_Health_zones.shp (see data/shapefiles/). Methodology: https://climate-conflict.org/www/index/methodology
datasets.license: CCVI data and documentation subject to terms at climate-conflict.org; processing code open source at https://github.com/ccew-unibw/ccvi-data

datasets.source: Cross-border passenger volumes from sitreps cited in Imperial College report on the 2026 DRC Ebola outbreak
datasets.citation: Imperial College London MRC GIDA. Report on the DRC Ebola outbreak, 18 May 2026.
datasets.license: Imperial College report citing public sitrep data; reuse with attribution to the report and underlying observations.

datasets.citation: World Health Organization. Bundibugyo Ebola virus outbreak, DRC: Weekly External Situation Report 01, data as of 18 May 2026.
datasets.license: WHO open access. Reuse with attribution per https://www.who.int/about/policies/publishing/copyright

datasets.source: Copernicus CDS satellite-land-cover (UN FAO LCCS); urban class 190 aggregated to DRC health zones
datasets.citation: Copernicus Climate Change Service (C3S) (2022). Land cover classification gridded maps from 1992 to present derived from satellite observations. Copernicus Climate Data Store (CDS). Health-zone geometry: DRC_Health_zones.shp (see data/shapefiles/).

datasets.source: Flowminder.org mobility / population-displacement estimates from Vodacom RDC CDR data
datasets.citation: Flowminder Foundation (2026). Estimations de population et mobilité — provincial reports for Ituri, Nord-Kivu, Haut-Uele, Tshopo, March 2026.
datasets.license: Flowminder reports are publicly released; cite the source organisation. See https://www.flowminder.org

datasets.source: Kummu et al. (2025) downscaled global GDP per capita (PPP), aggregated to DRC health zones
datasets.citation: Kummu, M., Kosonen, M. & Masoumzadeh Sayyar, S. (2025). Downscaled gridded global dataset for gross domestic product (GDP) per capita PPP over 1990–2022. Scientific Data 12, 178. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-025-04487-x. Data: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10976733. Health-zone geometry: DRC_Health_zones.shp (see data/shapefiles/).
datasets.license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0); see Nature Scientific Data and Zenodo record terms

datasets.source: Healthsites.io OpenStreetMap health-facility extract (DRC), aggregated to health zones
datasets.citation: OpenStreetMap contributors; Healthsites.io (https://healthsites.io). Democratic Republic of the Congo node extract. Health-zone geometry: DRC_Health_zones.shp (see data/shapefiles/).
datasets.license: Open Database License (ODbL) 1.0; © OpenStreetMap contributors — see raw/LICENSE.txt and raw/README.md

datasets.source: OSRM road-network routing (OpenStreetMap) applied to DRC health-zone polygons
datasets.citation: OpenStreetMap contributors (2026). Routing via Project OSRM. Health-zone geometry: DRC_Health_zones.shp (see data/shapefiles/).
datasets.license: OpenStreetMap data © OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL 1.0 (https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright). OSRM routing engine: BSD-2-Clause.

datasets.source: WorldPop gridded population estimates aggregated to DRC health zones
datasets.citation: WorldPop (2025). Population counts and densities for Democratic Republic of the Congo health zones. University of Southampton. https://www.worldpop.org. Health-zone geometry: DRC_Health_zones.shp (see data/shapefiles/).
datasets.license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0); see https://www.worldpop.org/geodata/licensing
